calendar-empty-state: Nothing logged yet. Go to My data to start.
chart-error-body: Check your connection and try again.
log-info-feeling: Track how you feel today – cramps, mood, fatigue, or add your own symptoms.
log-info-flow: Track your menstrual bleeding: spotting, light, medium, or heavy. Mark Day 1 when your full flow starts.
log-info-fluids: Choose the option that best matches your cervical fluid today – from sticky or creamy to egg-white or watery.
log-info-flux: Log your temperature here. Take your temp at the same time every morning, before getting up. Mark Temp shift when you notice a sustained rise – this signals that ovulation has passed.
log-info-free-form: Notes for the day – anything you want to remember.
log-info-fysical: Optional note on sex: protected, unprotected, or withdrawal – for your own reference.
